# Mission Template

- `Title:`
- `Problem Statement (<=255 chars):`
- `Desired Outcome:`
- `Success Metrics:`
- `Scope Boundary:`
- `Primary Hat Lens + Reason:`
- `Bet Framing:`
  - `Hypothesis:`
  - `Minimum Proof:`
  - `Kill Criteria:`
- `Source References:`
- `Readiness Verdict: Ready | Needs Refinement`
- `Failed Gates:` (required when `Needs Refinement`)
- `Missing Sources:` (required when grounding is incomplete)
